text-block-1.title: POJO-based Adaptation Layer
text-block-1.text:
Sling Models provide an annotation-based way to map Sling resources to Java objects. Instead of manually extracting properties from resources, you define a model class and let Sling handle the mapping automatically.

Think of Sling Models as the interface that translates raw Matrix code into comprehensible objects - data made manifest.

code-block-1.title: Sling Model Example

text-block-2.title: Common Annotations
text-block-2.text:
• @Model - Marks class as a Sling Model
  • @ValueMapValue - Injects property from resource
  • @ChildResource - Injects child resource as model
  • @OSGiService - Injects OSGi service
  • @PostConstruct - Called after injection
  • @Default - Provides default value
